UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the AI Lo-Fi Channel Factory application, managing their projects and content.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Organizes multiple Lo-Fi channel initiatives and their associated content, acting as a high-level container for a creator's work.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the project's goals and scope.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this project. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Project)

status.description: The current status of the project (e.g., 'active', 'archived', 'on-hold').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: Represents a single YouTube channel managed by the application, used for publishing Lo-Fi content.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Channel entity.

projectId.description: Reference to the Project this channel belongs to. (Relationship: Project 1:N Channel)

name.description: The name of the YouTube channel.

youtubeChannelId.description: The unique ID assigned by YouTube for this channel.

niche.description: The specific micro-niche or theme of the channel (e.g., 'Rainy Coffee Shop Lo-Fi').

subscribers.description: The current number of subscribers for the channel.

dailyUploadLimit.description: The maximum number of videos allowed to be uploaded to this channel per day.

status.description: The operational status of the channel within the app (e.g., 'active', 'suspended', 'under review').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the channel record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the channel record was last updated.

NicheStrategy.title: NicheStrategy
NicheStrategy.description: Stores insights and recommendations generated by the AI-Driven Micro-Niche Strategy Tool.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NicheStrategy entity.

name.description: A descriptive name for the niche strategy.

strategyDetails.description: A detailed report or summary of the AI's analysis and strategic recommendations.

identifiedKeywords.description: A list of high-potential keywords identified for this niche.

suggestedArtists.description: A list of artists or styles suggested by the AI for this niche.

channelIds.description: References to channels that are (or will be) utilizing this niche strategy. (Relationship: NicheStrategy N:N Channel)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the niche strategy was generated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the niche strategy was last updated.

Script.title: Script
Script.description: Stores AI-generated textual content, such as narration or thematic descriptions, intended for video production.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Script entity.

topic.description: The main topic or theme of the script.

scriptText.description: The full text of the AI-generated script.

hook.description: An engaging opening line or phrase from the script, often used for video titles or descriptions.

lengthSeconds.description: The estimated or actual length of the script in seconds, useful for audio generation.

nicheStrategyId.description: Reference to the NicheStrategy that inspired or guided the creation of this script. (Relationship: NicheStrategy 1:N Script)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the script was generated.

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents a digital media asset (e.g., audio, image, video clip) stored in cloud storage, used in content creation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Asset entity.

fileUrl.description: The URL or path to the asset file in cloud storage.

durationSeconds.description: The duration of the asset in seconds, if applicable (e.g., for audio/video).

metadata.description: Additional unstructured metadata specific to the asset type (e.g., BPM, key for music; resolution for images).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the asset record was created.

MusicPrompt.title: MusicPrompt
MusicPrompt.description: Stores AI-generated prompts specifically crafted for AI music generation tools.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MusicPrompt entity.

promptText.description: The detailed prompt text sent to an AI music generator.

niche.description: The musical niche or genre targeted by this prompt.

artistStyle.description: Specific artist or musical style suggested in the prompt.

generatedAssetIds.description: References to the music assets generated using this prompt. (Relationship: MusicPrompt 1:N Asset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the music prompt was generated.

VisualPrompt.title: VisualPrompt
VisualPrompt.description: Stores AI-generated prompts specifically crafted for AI image and animation tools.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VisualPrompt entity.

promptText.description: The detailed prompt text sent to an AI image or animation generator.

niche.description: The visual niche or theme targeted by this prompt.

artStyle.description: Specific art style or aesthetic requested in the prompt.

generatedAssetIds.description: References to the visual assets generated using this prompt. (Relationship: VisualPrompt 1:N Asset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the visual prompt was generated.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: The core entity representing a single Lo-Fi video produced by the factory, encompassing all its components and metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Video entity.

channelId.description: Reference to the Channel where this video is intended to be published. (Relationship: Channel 1:N Video)

scriptId.description: Reference to the Script used for this video. (Relationship: Script 1:N Video)

voiceAssetId.description: Reference to the voice Asset used for narration in this video. (Relationship: Asset 1:N Video)

musicAssetIds.description: References to the music Assets used in this video. (Relationship: Asset N:N Video)

visualAssetIds.description: References to the visual Assets (images, animations) used in this video. (Relationship: Asset N:N Video)

thumbnailAssetId.description: Reference to the thumbnail Asset for this video. (Relationship: Asset 1:N Video)

finalVideoAssetId.description: Reference to the final rendered video Asset file. (Relationship: Asset 1:N Video)

title.description: The AI-generated or user-defined title for the YouTube video.

description.description: The AI-generated or user-defined detailed description for the YouTube video, including SEO and monetization info.

tags.description: A list of SEO-optimized tags for the YouTube video.

hashtags.description: A list of hashtags for the YouTube video description.

status.description: The internal production status of the video (e.g., 'draft', 'rendering', 'published').

reviewStatus.description: The current review status by a user (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'revision_requested').

reviewerComment.description: Optional comments from the reviewer regarding the video content.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the video record was created.

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the video was successfully published to YouTube.

Playlist.title: Playlist
Playlist.description: Defines the specific arrangement and sequence of music assets to form a continuous audio experience for a video.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Playlist entity.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video this playlist is associated with. (Relationship: Video 1:N Playlist)

orderedMusicAssetIds.description: An ordered list of music Asset IDs constituting the playlist. (Relationship: Asset N:N Playlist)

description.description: A brief description or theme of the playlist.

durationSeconds.description: The total duration of the playlist in seconds.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the playlist was created.

RenderJob.title: RenderJob
RenderJob.description: Tracks the status and progress of a video rendering job within the automated production pipeline.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RenderJob entity.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video being rendered. (Relationship: Video 1:N RenderJob)

status.description: The current status of the rendering job.

workerId.description: Identifier of the worker instance processing this job.

logDetails.description: Details from the rendering process, including errors or progress messages.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the render job was created.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the rendering completed (or failed).

UploadJob.title: UploadJob
UploadJob.description: Manages the automated uploading and scheduling of a video to a specific YouTube channel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UploadJob entity.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video being uploaded. (Relationship: Video 1:N UploadJob)

channelId.description: Reference to the Channel where the video will be uploaded. (Relationship: Channel 1:N UploadJob)

status.description: The current status of the upload job.

scheduledAt.description: The planned date and time for the video upload.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the video was successfully uploaded to YouTube.

youtubeVideoId.description: The unique ID assigned by YouTube to the uploaded video.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the upload job was created.

VideoAnalytic.title: VideoAnalytic
VideoAnalytic.description: Stores daily performance metrics collected for a specific video from YouTube and other integrated platforms.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VideoAnalytic entity.

videoId.description: Reference to the Video these analytics belong to. (Relationship: Video 1:N VideoAnalytic)

date.description: The date for which these analytics were recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

views.description: Number of views recorded for the video on this date.

watchTimeMinutes.description: Total watch time in minutes for the video on this date.

likes.description: Number of likes recorded for the video on this date.

comments.description: Number of comments recorded for the video on this date.

clickThroughRate.description: Click-through rate (CTR) for the video on this date, as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this analytic record was created.

ChannelAnalytic.title: ChannelAnalytic
ChannelAnalytic.description: Stores daily or periodic aggregate performance metrics for a specific YouTube channel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChannelAnalytic entity.

channelId.description: Reference to the Channel these analytics belong to. (Relationship: Channel 1:N ChannelAnalytic)

date.description: The date for which these aggregate analytics were recorded (YYYY-MM-DD).

totalViews.description: Cumulative total views for all videos on the channel up to this date.

totalWatchTimeMinutes.description: Cumulative total watch time in minutes for all videos on the channel up to this date.

totalSubscribers.description: Total subscriber count for the channel on this date.

videosUploaded.description: Total number of videos uploaded to the channel up to this date.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this analytic record was created.

BeatListing.title: BeatListing
BeatListing.description: Details about an AI-generated music beat listed for sale on an external platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BeatListing entity.

musicAssetId.description: Reference to the music Asset being listed for sale. (Relationship: Asset 1:N BeatListing)

platform.description: The external platform where the beat is listed (e.g., 'BeatStars', 'Gumroad').

externalUrl.description: The direct URL to the beat listing on the external platform.

priceUsd.description: The base price of the beat in USD.

licensingOptions.description: A list of available licensing options for the beat (e.g., 'standard', 'premium', 'exclusive').

status.description: The current status of the beat listing (e.g., 'listed', 'draft', 'delisted').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the beat listing record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the beat listing was last updated.

BeatSale.title: BeatSale
BeatSale.description: Records an individual sale of a music beat, tracking monetization efforts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BeatSale entity.

beatListingId.description: Reference to the BeatListing that was sold. (Relationship: BeatListing 1:N BeatSale)

saleDate.description: Timestamp when the beat sale occurred.

amountUsd.description: The total amount of the sale in USD.

buyerInfo.description: Anonymized information about the buyer (e.g., country, masked identifier).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this sale record was created.

ViralClone.title: ViralClone
ViralClone.description: Tracks instances where the system automatically clones successful content for replication, based on viral patterns.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ViralClone entity.

originalVideoId.description: Reference to the original viral video that triggered the cloning. (Relationship: Video 1:N ViralClone)

newScriptId.description: Reference to the new Script generated for the cloned video. (Relationship: Script 1:N ViralClone)

clonedVideoId.description: Reference to the newly created video entity that is a clone. (Relationship: Video 1:N ViralClone)

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cloning operation was initiated.

ruleTriggered.description: A description of the rule or condition that triggered this viral cloning (e.g., 'views > 500k').

AssetEmbedding.title: AssetEmbedding
AssetEmbedding.description: Stores vector embeddings and associated tags for media assets, enabling semantic search and content recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AssetEmbedding entity.

assetId.description: Reference to the Asset for which this embedding was generated. (Relationship: Asset 1:N AssetEmbedding)

embeddingVector.description: The numerical vector representation (embedding) of the asset's content.

tags.description: A list of semantic tags associated with the asset for search purposes.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the embedding was generated.

JobQueueItem.title: JobQueueItem
JobQueueItem.description: Represents an item in the system's asynchronous job queue, coordinating various production tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobQueueItem entity.

jobType.description: The type of task this job represents (e.g., 'script_generation', 'video_rendering', 'youtube_upload').

payload.description: A JSON object containing job-specific data and parameters required for processing.

status.description: The current status of the job in the queue.

priority.description: An optional priority level for the job, affecting processing order (higher number = higher priority).

errorMessage.description: Details of any error encountered if the job failed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was added to the queue.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the job started processing.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the job completed (successfully or failed).

StrategyInsight.title: StrategyInsight
StrategyInsight.description: Stores actionable insights and recommendations generated by the AI feedback loop to optimize future content strategy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StrategyInsight entity.

title.description: A concise title summarizing the insight.

insightText.description: Detailed explanation of the AI-identified content pattern or strategy.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when this insight was generated.

nicheAffected.description: The specific content niche or theme that this insight pertains to.

recommendedActions.description: A list of concrete actions recommended by the AI (e.g., 'create more videos about X', 'target keyword Y').

sourceDataSummary.description: A summary or reference to the analytics data that informed this insight.

isActionable.description: Indicates if the insight provides clear, implementable actions.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the strategy insight was created.

definition.description: Root collection for all user profiles. Each document is owned by the user whose ID matches the document ID. Access is strictly self-service, meaning users can only read/write their own profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Collection of content projects owned by a specific user. Each document includes denormalized 'ownerId' for authorization independence, ensuring only the authenticated user can manage their projects.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the project.

definition.description: Subcollection for YouTube channels associated with a specific project. Each document includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent project.

params.name: channelId
params.description: The unique ID of the channel.

definition.description: Collection of AI-generated niche strategies relevant to a specific project. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent project.

params.name: nicheStrategyId

params.name: projectId

definition.description: Collection of AI-generated music prompts for a specific project. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

definition.description: Collection of AI-generated visual prompts for a specific project. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'projectId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId

params.name: videoId

definition.description: Subcollection of music playlists created for a specific video. Includes denormalized 'ownerId', 'projectId', 'channelId', and 'videoId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent project.

params.name: channelId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent channel.

params.name: videoId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent video.

params.name: playlistId
params.description: The unique ID of the playlist.

definition.description: Subcollection tracking rendering jobs for a specific video. Includes denormalized 'ownerId', 'projectId', 'channelId', and 'videoId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId

params.name: videoId

params.name: renderJobId

params.name: userId

params.name: projectId

params.name: uploadJobId
params.description: The unique ID of the upload job.

definition.description: Subcollection storing daily performance analytics for a specific video. Includes denormalized 'ownerId', 'projectId', 'channelId', and 'videoId' for authorization independence. 'analyticId' could be based on the date for easy retrieval.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent project.

params.name: channelId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent channel.

params.name: videoId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent video.

params.name: analyticId
params.description: The unique ID for the analytic record (e.g., date-based).

definition.description: Subcollection storing daily performance analytics for a specific channel. Includes denormalized 'ownerId', 'projectId', and 'channelId' for authorization independence. 'analyticId' could be based on the date.

params.name: userId

params.name: beatListingId

definition.description: Subcollection recording individual sales for a specific beat listing. Includes denormalized 'ownerId', 'projectId', 'assetId', and 'beatListingId' for authorization independence.

params.name: saleId

params.name: userId

params.name: cloneId
params.description: The unique ID of the viral clone record.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore data structure follows a strict hierarchical model, starting from the user profile, then branching into projects, channels, and finally, the content creation workflow elements. This design prioritizes **Authorization Independence** by denormalizing key ownership and parentage information into every document. Specifically, each document at a lower level in the hierarchy (e.g., a Channel, Video, or Asset) will contain denormalized fields like `ownerId` (referencing the UserProfile's ID), `projectId`, `channelId`, `videoId`, `assetId`, and `beatListingId` as appropriate. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls in Firestore security rules, ensuring atomic operations and robust, easily debuggable access control. For example, a `Video` document will explicitly store its `ownerId`, `projectId`, and `channelId`, allowing security rules to instantly verify `request.auth.uid == resource.data.ownerId` without fetching parent documents.

**Structural Segregation** is achieved by placing all user-owned data under a `/userProfiles/{userId}` root. Within this, projects, channels, and their associated content (videos, scripts, assets, jobs, analytics) are further segregated. This ensures that all documents within a given subcollection (e.g., `/channels`) share the same security posture: they are owned by the parent project and ultimately the authenticated user. This prevents mixing data with different access requirements and greatly simplifies security rules.

**Querying for Authorization Purposes (QAPs)** is directly supported by this structure. Because all user-specific data is contained within a `/userProfiles/{userId}/...` path, a user can securely `list` all their projects by querying `/userProfiles/{request.auth.uid}/projects`. Similarly, listing all videos for a specific channel is a simple query on `/userProfiles/{request.auth.uid}/projects/{projectId}/channels/{channelId}/videos`. The denormalized fields allow for efficient server-side filtering and rule validation without exposing unauthorized data, adhering to the 'rules are not filters' principle. The system's internal job queue (`JobQueueItem`) is explicitly noted as an external Redis/PubSub system, aligning with the user's PostgreSQL/Cloud Storage/Redis architecture and avoiding placing transient, high-volume operational data in Firestore.
